title: Senior Software Engineer - Nature's Basket - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Nature's Basket - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Nature's Basket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Nature's Basket:
Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket!
